name: Flying a Ranch Fowl Thing
recipeIngredient: puff pastry dough or phyllo sheets
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the chicken breasts to flatten them.
2. In a large bowl, combine the spinach, cream cheese, pepper, garlic, and basil.
3. Divide the spinach mixture equally among the chicken breasts.
4. Fold the chicken in half.
5. Drizzle with melted butter.
6. Using your own puff pastry or phyllo sheets, wrap the chicken.
7. Brush with more melted butter.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit in an oven for approximately 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
Serves: 6
Flying A Guest Ranch Cookbook
Flying A Ranch
Pinedale, Wyoming
